issuing_authority: Ministry of Labour and Employment, Government of India / Maharashtra Factory Inspectorate
key_requirements: Obtain and renew factory licence annually; maintain prescribed registers
Ensure safe working conditions: guarding of machinery, proper ventilation, lighting, and sanitation
Comply with working hours, overtime, and leave provisions for workers

issuing_authority: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change (MoEFCC) / Maharashtra Pollution Control Board (MPCB)
key_requirements: Obtain Consent to Establish (CTE) and Consent to Operate (CTO) from MPCB
Comply with prescribed standards for air emissions, wastewater, and noise
Submit periodic environmental compliance reports to MPCB

act_or_regulation: Hazardous and Other Wastes (Management and Transboundary Movement) Rules, 2016
issuing_authority: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change / Maharashtra Pollution Control Board
key_requirements: Identify and classify hazardous wastes generated (hydraulic oil, waste solvents, electrical waste)
Obtain authorisation for storage and disposal; use only MPCB-approved recyclers/disposers
Maintain waste manifest records and submit annual returns to MPCB

issuing_authority: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change / MPCB
key_requirements: Comply with Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) obligations for plastic packaging
Ensure minimum recycled content norms for plastic packaging as notified
Maintain records of plastic waste generation, collection, and recycling; file annual EPR returns

act_or_regulation: BIS Standards for HDPE Containers (IS 7223 / IS 16848 and related)
key_requirements: Ensure HDPE containers meet specified dimensions, wall thickness, and material properties per applicable BIS standard
Conduct drop test, top-load test, and leak test as per BIS requirements
Obtain BIS licence (ISI mark) if applicable for regulated product categories

act_or_regulation: Legal Metrology Act, 2009 and Legal Metrology (Packaged Commodities) Rules, 2011
issuing_authority: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution / State Legal Metrology Department
key_requirements: Ensure all pre-packed commodities declare net quantity, MRP, manufacturer's name and address on label
Comply with prescribed minimum declaration font sizes and label placement
Obtain registration/licence as manufacturer of packaged commodities if applicable

act_or_regulation: Electricity Act, 2003 and MSEDCL Supply Code
issuing_authority: Maharashtra State Electricity Distribution Co. Ltd (MSEDCL) / Maharashtra Electricity Regulatory Commission (MERC)
key_requirements: Maintain valid MSEDCL commercial/industrial connection agreement; pay tariffs on time
Ensure all electrical installations comply with IE Rules 1956; maintain periodic electrical safety inspection reports
Install energy meters as prescribed; report faults or unauthorised connections promptly
Register establishment under the Act; display registration certificate
Comply with working hours, weekly off, and paid leave provisions
Maintain prescribed registers of employees, attendance, and wages
Register establishment and eligible employees with ESIC; deduct and remit ESI contributions monthly
Maintain ESI records; assist employees in availing medical and sickness benefits
File half-yearly ESI returns within prescribed due dates

act_or_regulation: Employees' Provident Funds and Miscellaneous Provisions Act, 1952 (EPF)
key_requirements: Register establishment; deduct and deposit PF contributions (employee + employer) by 15th of each month
File monthly ECR (Electronic Challan cum Return) via EPFO unified portal
Ensure new employees are enrolled promptly; update KYC details on UAN portal

issuing_authority: Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs (CBIC) / GST Network
key_requirements: Maintain GST registration; file GSTR-1 (outward supplies) and GSTR-3B (summary return) within due dates
Issue tax invoices as per GST rules; maintain input tax credit (ITC) records accurately
Conduct annual GST reconciliation; file GSTR-9 annual return

act_or_regulation: Fire Prevention and Life Safety Measures — Maharashtra Fire Prevention and Life Safety Measures Act, 2006
issuing_authority: Maharashtra Fire Services / Local Municipal Authority
key_requirements: Obtain No Objection Certificate (NOC) from fire department; renew periodically
Install and maintain prescribed fire-fighting equipment (extinguishers, hose reels, hydrants)
Conduct fire drills at least twice a year; maintain drill records
